meta.name: Octupie
meta.tagline: Your personal viral-content researcher and script-writing agentic workflow
meta.tab-title: Octupie | Your viral-content researcher & script-writing agent
meta.meta-description: The easiest way to research top channels, find viral outliers, and remix them into your own winning videos.
meta.positioning: Pre-launch. Built for short-form creators. Instagram Reels at launch, LinkedIn next. End to end agentic workflow, not just a research tool.

tone.voice: Confident, direct, creator-first. No hype words, no generic AI voice.

language-rules.rule: No em dashes (U+2014) or en dashes (U+2013). Replace with commas, colons, periods, or parentheses.
Never fabricate testimonials or user quotes while pre-launch.
Use niche archetypes and honest pre-launch framing for social proof.

token.name: bg-surface-1
token.role: Primary card / panel background. Nav pill when scrolled. FAQ item bg. Features card bg.

token.name: bg-surface-1-60
token.role: Hero visual frame with subtle see-through.

token.name: bg-surface-1-95
token.role: Fixed nav pill background after scroll > 24px.

token.name: bg-surface-2
token.role: Popover, muted secondary surface, active tab pill background inside FAQ switcher.

token.name: bg-surface-3
token.role: Active step card background. Why Octupie fix icon wrapper.

token.name: bg-surface-accent-gradient
token.role: Feature illustration frame, niche icon badge.

token.name: brand-accent-1
token.role: Primary accent, links, dividers, rings, hover CTA, glow.

token.name: brand-accent-2
token.role: CTA fill, primary button, wordmark highlight.

token.name: brand-accent-3
token.role: Eyebrow labels, secondary accent text (Why Octupie eyebrow, FAQ link text, Pre launch pill text).

token.name: brand-accent-weak-1
token.role: Card glow fills, blur blob fills.

token.name: text-muted
token.role: Feature body text, niche blurb, FAQ answer.

token.name: border-brand
token.role: Active / focus border on cards and inputs.

token.name: grid-line
token.role: Hero + feature illustration grid overlay lines.

heading-rules.rule: All h1..h6 use Host Grotesk, font-weight 500, letter-spacing -0.02em.
Display scale for section titles: 40..56..68px, via clamp on hero (clamp(32px,9vw,40px) base then 52 / 60 / 68 at sm / md / lg).
Eyebrow labels are 12px uppercase, tracking 0.18em to 0.22em, muted or brand-accent-3 colored.

token.name: pill
token.role: Nav, buttons, FAQ tab switcher, waitlist input pills.

shadow.name: card-gradient-border
shadow.role: Pseudo-element masked gradient border, see globals.css .card-gradient-border.

shadow.name: glow-pulse
shadow.role: Waitlist attention pulse, 2.4s infinite, CSS @keyframes glow-pulse.

breakpoints.approach: Mobile first. Most sections collapse to single column below md, switch to 2 or 3 col at md and above.

motion.rule: No unconditional scroll-behavior: smooth on html (sticks on wheel). Smooth applied only under html:focus-within and prefers-reduced-motion: no-preference.
Long running transforms (marquee rows) use .gpu-layer: will-change:transform; translateZ(0); backface-visibility:hidden.

keyframe.name: marquee
keyframe.desc: translateX 0 to -50% over 60s linear infinite. Duplicated children. Reverse direction alternates rows.

keyframe.name: glow-pulse
keyframe.desc: 2.4s ease-out, box-shadow expands from 0 to 18px 60% through, fades out.

keyframe.name: oct-pulse-a
keyframe.desc: Opacity 0.55 to 1 to 0.55 over 3.2s, offsets stagger rows in illustrations.

utility.name: .bg-grid-overlay
utility.desc: 48px x 48px 1px white 4% grid, layered via two linear-gradients.

utility.name: .card-gradient-border
utility.desc: Pseudo element with linear-gradient(151deg,...) top-left and linear-gradient(-29deg,...) bottom-right, masked via -webkit-mask-composite: xor to render only a 1px gradient border around the card.

utility.name: .gradient-radial-bottom
utility.desc: 60% x 80% radial at 50% 100%, brand-accent-2 at 35% opacity to transparent.

utility.name: .scroll-optimize
utility.desc: content-visibility: auto; contain-intrinsic-size: 800px. Opt-in for below-fold sections.

utility.name: .gpu-layer
utility.desc: will-change: transform; transform: translateZ(0); backface-visibility: hidden.

safety-rules.rule: Never set scroll-behavior: smooth on html unconditionally. Wheel scroll feels sticky.
Do not use backdrop-blur-md or larger on wide fixed elements (nav, toast) -> per-frame reblur janks scroll.
Sections with absolute decorations MUST have overflow-x-clip (not overflow-hidden, to preserve position:sticky inside).

body.rationale: Browser extensions (ColorZilla cz-shortcut-listen, Grammarly) mutate body attrs post-hydration; suppressing is the canonical fix.

metadata.title: Octupie | Your viral-content researcher & script-writing agent

page-composition.order: Nav, Hero, Features, HowItWorks, SocialProof, WhyOctupie, Cta, Faq, Footer

logo.name: OctupieLogo
logo.concept: Rounded square badge in brand gradient (#4C61FF to #014CE3). Eight white dots on a radius-10 ring representing both eight tentacles and eight pie slices. Central white circle (r=5) with an inset gradient dot (r=2). Reads as octopus, pie chart, and radar.

component.name: Wordmark
component.layout: Brandmark + Octupie text at font-heading text-xl weight 500 tracking-tight text-white, gap-2

favicon.spec: Same OctupieLogo geometry as static SVG. Next.js 16 App Router auto-registers src/app/icon.svg as favicon. Do NOT add favicon.ico, it duplicates.

icon.name: InstagramIcon
icon.detail: Rounded square camera body, white outlined inner square and lens circle, small white highlight dot at (17,7). Gradient id generated via React useId so instances do not clash.

icon.name: LinkedInIcon
icon.detail: White 'in' mark rendered as compound path (i dot + stem, n stem + hump).

niche-icons.spec: Line style, 24x24 viewbox, stroke currentColor, stroke-width 1.6, linecap/linejoin round. Default rendered inside a 40x40 rounded-xl badge with border-white/10 and a bg-gradient-to-br from-[#0a1636] to-[#040E22], icon colored text-[#9BB2FF].
niche-icons.kinds: fitness, finance, skincare, selfImprovement, food, gaming, coach, travel, design, saas, education, music, realEstate, parenting, health, chef, podcast, personalBrand

hero-visualization.purpose: 3 stage animated dashboard replacing the static hero dashboard. Lives inside a rounded-xl aspect-[2/1] frame behind card-gradient-border.

feature-illustrations.keys: track, voice, hooks, daily, titles, agentic, alerts
feature-illustrations.purpose: Inline SVG mini dashboards, 400x250 and 640x250 viewboxes, paired with each feature card. Platform chips use real Instagram/LinkedIn SVG marks (not IG/IN text).

step-illustrations.purpose: One illustration per How it works step, swapped when the user clicks or hovers a step card.

photography.note: No real-person photography is shipped. All avatar webp assets in /public/images (husein.webp, cody.webp, etc.) are deprecated and must not be reused while Octupie is pre-launch. Only generic Avatar Image webps (a1, a2, a3) may be used as non-attributed decorative avatars.

component.name: WaitlistButton
component.structure: Opens WaitlistDialog on click. Label plus ' ' plus rightward arrow (→).
component.style-base: inline-flex shrink-0 items-center justify-center gap-2 whitespace-nowrap rounded-full px-4 py-2 text-xs font-medium transition sm:px-5 sm:py-2.5 sm:text-sm

component.name: WaitlistForm

state.name: idle
state.desc: Name input, email input, CTA button in one pill row at sm+.

state.name: loading
state.desc: Inputs disabled. CTA label swaps to 'Joining...'.

state.name: ok
state.desc: Entire form replaced with a single confirmation pill: rounded-full border-[#4C61FF]/30 bg-[#4C61FF]/10 px-5 py-3 text-sm text-[#9BB2FF], check icon plus 'You are on the list. We will be in touch soon.' Do NOT leave empty input pills visible in success state.

state.name: err
state.desc: Form stays, error message p shown below with text-red-300 text-xs, sm:basis-full sm:text-center.

component.input-style: w-full flex-1 rounded-full border border-white/15 bg-white/5 px-5 py-3 text-sm text-white placeholder:text-white/45 outline-none transition focus:border-[#4C61FF] focus:bg-white/10
component.cta-style: rounded-full bg-[#014CE3] px-6 py-3 text-sm font-medium text-white, same shadow as WaitlistButton primary, hover:bg-[#4C61FF], disabled:opacity-60
component.api-endpoint: POST /api/waitlist with JSON { name, email }, expects { ok: boolean, error?: string }.

component.name: WaitlistDialog
component.overlay: fixed inset-0 z-[100] bg-black/60 backdrop-blur-sm, closes on outside click.
component.panel: max-w-md rounded-2xl border border-white/10 bg-[#040E22] p-8.
component.close-button: Absolute top-right circle, border-white/10 bg-white/5, text 'x'.
component.heading: Join the Octupie waitlist (font-heading text-2xl).
component.subcopy: Leave your name and email. You will be first to know when we launch plus get early-access perks.

component.name: Brandmark + Wordmark
component.brandmark: SVG OctupieLogo h-7 w-7 by default.
component.wordmark: flex items-center gap-2, Brandmark plus span 'Octupie' font-heading text-xl font-medium tracking-tight text-white.

section.container: fixed inset-x-0 top-0 z-50, padding pt-4 px-4, justify-center.

pill.base: flex w-full items-center justify-between rounded-full border px-4 py-2 transition-all duration-300.
pill.state-scrolled: max-w-[1100px] border-white/10 bg-[#040E22]/95 shadow-[0_8px_30px_rgba(0,0,0,0.35)]. No backdrop-blur (blur is forbidden on wide fixed bars to avoid scroll jank).
pill.scroll-handler: rAF throttled, deterministic initial state (false, synced in useEffect post-mount), no setState per wheel tick.

links.class: hidden items-center gap-8 md:flex, each a text-sm text-white/75 hover:text-white

section.mobile-menu: fixed inset-x-4 top-20 z-40 rounded-2xl border border-white/10 bg-[#040E22] p-6 md:hidden. Vertical list of same links.

section.wrapper: relative overflow-hidden pt-36 pb-20 md:pt-44 md:pb-28.
section.container: relative mx-auto max-w-[1200px] px-6, center column.

announce-pill.wrapper: flex max-w-full flex-wrap items-center justify-center gap-x-1.5 gap-y-1 rounded-full border border-white/10 bg-white/5 px-3 py-1.5 text-xs text-white/80 backdrop-blur-sm.
announce-pill.content: "Built with" + InstagramIcon h-3.5 w-3.5 + "creators (" + LinkedInIcon h-3.5 w-3.5 opacity-70 + "coming soon)".

headline.classes: mt-6 font-heading text-[clamp(32px,9vw,40px)] leading-[1.08] tracking-tight text-white text-balance break-words hyphens-auto sm:text-[52px] md:text-[60px] lg:text-[68px] sm:leading-[1.05].
headline.copy: Your personal viral-content<br sm+> researcher & script-writing<br sm+> agentic workflow

section.subcopy: mt-6 max-w-2xl text-base text-white/70 md:text-lg. "The smarter way to research top creators, find viral content, and implement it in your voice and style. End to end, not just a research tool."
section.form-slot: mt-8 w-full max-w-xl, wraps WaitlistForm with ctaLabel "Join the Waitlist" + small note "Early access invites go out in waves. No spam, just launch news."

product-frame.card: card-gradient-border overflow-hidden rounded-2xl border border-white/10 bg-[#040E22]/60 p-3 backdrop-blur-sm.
product-frame.inner: relative aspect-[2/1] overflow-hidden rounded-xl, hosts HeroVisualization.

h2.classes: mt-3 font-heading text-4xl leading-tight tracking-tight text-white md:text-[56px]

heading-block.h2: Everything a viral short-form workflow actually needs

card.base: card-gradient-border group relative overflow-hidden rounded-2xl border border-white/10 bg-[#040E22] p-6 transition hover:bg-[#081433]. wide=true applies md:col-span-2.
card.illustration-frame: relative mb-5 overflow-hidden rounded-xl border border-white/5 bg-gradient-to-br from-[#0a152c] to-[#040E22]. Aspect 32/13 when wide, 16/10 otherwise. Hover zoom scale-[1.02].
card.title: font-heading text-xl leading-snug tracking-tight text-white md:text-[22px].

features.order: track(wide), voice, hooks, daily, titles, agentic(wide), alerts

feature.title: Track the creators you want to beat

features.feature: Follow any Instagram creator and get a live feed of what is actually working for them. No manual scrolling, no spreadsheets. LinkedIn support coming soon.

feature.title: Copy, analyse and recreate outlier scripts, in your voice

features.feature: Octupie does not hand you someone else is words. It dissects why a script went viral, then rewrites it in your tone, pacing and vocabulary.

feature.title: Recreate hooks that are already working

features.feature: Hook templates pulled from your niche's top 1% outliers, rewritten for your topic so you never start a video from a blank page.
Wake up to a fresh shortlist of video angles sourced from real outlier performance in your niche, not generic AI prompts.
Every script ships with title, caption and hashtag variants tuned to each platform. Paste and post.

feature.title: An agentic workflow, not just a research tool

features.feature: From research to analysis to script to caption, Octupie runs the loop end-to-end so you spend time filming, not digging through dashboards.

feature.title: Outlier alerts the moment they happen

features.feature: The second a creator you track posts a Reel that breaks past their baseline, Octupie pings you with the outlier, its analysis and a draft script so you can react the same day.

heading.subcopy: One agentic loop. No more jumping between tabs, tools and half-finished docs.

step-pills.pill-default: rounded-full border border-white/10 bg-white/[0.03] text-white/65 px-3.5 py-1.5 text-xs font-medium.
step-pills.number-badge: h-5 w-5 rounded-full text-[10px] font-bold. Active: bg-[#014CE3] text-white. Default: bg-white/10 text-white/70.
step-pills.connector: dashed line 18px + filled arrow polygon, color rgba(76,97,255,0.9) when passed, rgba(255,255,255,0.18..0.25) otherwise.

section.mobile-fallback: md:hidden, mt-6 text-xs uppercase tracking-[0.18em] text-white/45. Content: "Research · Analyse · Script · Caption".
section.grid: mt-12 grid grid-cols-1 items-start gap-8 lg:grid-cols-[380px_1fr].
section.step-list: flex flex-col gap-3 buttons, each group relative overflow-hidden rounded-2xl border p-5 text-left. Active: border-[#014CE3]/50 bg-[#0a1636]. Default: border-white/10 bg-[#040E22], hover:border-white/20 hover:bg-[#081433].
section.preview-pane: relative lg:sticky lg:top-24, card wraps aspect-[16/10] illustration.

step.title: Pick the creators you want to learn from

steps.step: Plug in any Instagram handle. Octupie tracks what is working for them in near real-time. LinkedIn support is on the roadmap.
We filter out their baseline and show only videos that massively out-performed. The ones worth studying.

step.title: Analyse the why: hooks, beats, style

steps.step: Octupie breaks down each outlier: hook pattern, story beats, pacing, format and the angle that made it land.

step.title: Recreate in your voice: script, title, caption

steps.step: One click turns insight into a ready-to-shoot script plus matching titles and captions, tuned to your tone and niche.

stats-row.layout: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 gap-8 text-center md:text-left

stat.headline: Top 1%
stat.desc: outliers surfaced for every niche you track, not baseline noise.

stat.headline: Instagram first
stat.desc: We are starting with Instagram Reels. LinkedIn is next on the roadmap.

stat.headline: End to end
stat.desc: From outlier to script to caption in your voice. No more copy paste chain.

pre-launch-banner.pill: inline-flex items-center gap-2 rounded-full border border-[#4C61FF]/30 bg-[#4C61FF]/10 px-3 py-1 text-[11px] font-medium uppercase tracking-[0.22em] text-[#9BB2FF]. Dot h-1.5 w-1.5 bg-[#4C61FF]. Text "Pre launch".
pre-launch-banner.h2: Built for short form creators across every niche
pre-launch-banner.p: Octupie has not launched yet. The niches below are the creator archetypes we are building the first release around. Join the waitlist to help shape which one we ship support for next.

section.platform-line: Flex wrap pill: InstagramIcon + "Reels live at launch." + LinkedInIcon opacity-80 + "creators onboard next.".

marquee.rows: Two rows. Row 1 niches 0..8 scrolls left, row 2 niches 9..17 scrolls right (reverse).
marquee.edge-fade: absolute inset-y-0 left/right w-24 bg-gradient from-[#020814] to-transparent.
marquee.track: gpu-layer flex shrink-0 animate-[marquee_60s_linear_infinite] gap-0, duplicated children for seamless loop.
marquee.card: mx-2 w-[300px] shrink-0 rounded-2xl border border-white/10 bg-[#040E22] p-5. Header: h-10 w-10 rounded-xl gradient badge with NicheIcon h-5 w-5 text-[#9BB2FF], plus label text-sm font-medium text-white. Blurb: mt-3 text-sm leading-relaxed text-white/70.

niches.niche: Outlier routines and form breakdowns, scripted in your voice.
Viral hooks for markets, money, and side hustle content.
Routine reveals and product breakdowns that convert.
Deep work, habits, and discipline scripts built for retention.
Viral recipe formats remixed into your kitchen and tone.
Reaction and explainer scripts around the latest drops.
Client magnet hooks and case study breakdowns on demand.
City guides and budget breakdowns written how you post.
Process reels and portfolio scripts from viral patterns.
Build in public scripts and product teardown breakdowns.
Class style explainers that keep viewers hooked for 60s.
Sample scripts, gear explainers, and reaction formats.
Listing tours and market takes engineered for Reels virality.
Relatable POV scripts that travel across your audience.
Evidence first scripts written in your clinician voice.
Signature dish reveal scripts engineered for saves.
Clippable hooks and retention edits for every episode.
Thought leader scripts that sound like you, not a bot.

backdrops.hairline: absolute inset-x-0 top-0 h-px max-w-3xl divider-line.
backdrops.blur-blob-a: absolute -left-40 top-40 h-72 w-72 rounded-full bg-[#014CE3]/10 blur-3xl.
backdrops.blur-blob-b: absolute -right-40 bottom-40 h-72 w-72 rounded-full bg-[#4C61FF]/10 blur-3xl.

heading.eyebrow-pill: inline-flex items-center gap-2 rounded-full border border-white/10 bg-white/5 px-3 py-1 text-xs font-medium uppercase tracking-[0.2em] text-[#9BB2FF]. Dot h-1.5 w-1.5 bg-[#4C61FF]. Text "Why Octupie".
heading.h2: Built to fix what research tools leave unfinished.
heading.subcopy: We talked to creators using today's viral-research apps. The same complaints came up. Octupie is the answer to each one.

card.top-right: Tag chip (bg-white/5 uppercase tracking-[0.18em] text-white/55) + big dim number "0N".

problem-half.bg: radial at top-left rgba(239,68,68,0.08) to transparent 55%.
problem-half.badge: h-6 w-6 rounded-md border border-red-400/25 bg-red-500/12 text-red-300 "x".
problem-half.title: font-heading text-[20..22px] text-white/90.

card.connector: h-px gradient line - circular badge with downward chevron SVG in brand color - h-px gradient line.

fix-half.bg: radial at bottom-right rgba(76,97,255,0.14) to transparent 60%.
fix-half.badge: h-6 w-6 rounded-md border border-[#4C61FF]/40 bg-[#4C61FF]/15 holding OctupieLogo h-3.5 w-3.5.
fix-half.title: font-heading text-[20..22px] text-white.

card.hover-accent: pointer-events-none absolute inset-x-0 bottom-0 h-[2px] bg-gradient-to-r transparent / brand / transparent, reveals on hover.

row.problem: Generic scripts in someone else's voice
You have to know exactly what to look for
row.fix: Daily outlier briefs for your niche

row.problem: Copy-paste hooks that nobody reacts to

footnote-strip.legend: Common pain in research tools today

card.frame: relative overflow-hidden rounded-3xl border border-white/10 bg-[#040E22] px-8 py-16 text-center md:px-16 md:py-20.
card.bg-image: next/image fill object-cover opacity-60, asset footerBg webp.
card.overlay: absolute inset-0 bg-gradient-to-b from-transparent via-[#040E22]/40 to-[#040E22].
card.h2: font-heading text-4xl leading-tight tracking-tight text-white md:text-[60px]. Two lines: "Stop researching." br(md+) "Start shipping."
card.subcopy: mx-auto mt-5 max-w-xl text-white/75 md:text-lg. "Join the waitlist to get early access to Octupie, your viral-content researcher and script-writing agentic workflow."
card.form-slot: mx-auto mt-8 w-full max-w-xl, WaitlistForm ctaLabel "Join the Waitlist" plus note "We will only email you launch news and early-access invites."

heading.contact-link: mailto:hello@octupie.com, text-sm text-[#4C61FF] hover:text-white, label "Contact us →".

section.tab-switcher: inline-flex items-center gap-1 rounded-full border border-white/10 bg-[#040E22] p-1. Each tab rounded-full px-5 py-2 text-sm. Selected: bg-[#15223C] text-white shadow-[inset_0_2px_4px_rgba(255,255,255,0.12)]. Unselected: text-white/70 hover:text-white.
section.items: mt-10 space-y-3, each item rounded-2xl border border-white/10 bg-[#040E22] overflow-hidden.
section.item-header: flex w-full items-center justify-between gap-6 px-6 py-5 text-left button. Question font-heading text-base text-white md:text-lg. Plus icon in a 28px circle, rotates 45deg when open.
section.item-body: grid transition-[grid-template-rows] duration-300 ease-out, grid-rows-[1fr] when open, grid-rows-[0fr] when closed. Inner p uses px-6 pb-5 text-sm leading-relaxed text-white/70.

qa.q: How is Octupie different from existing viral-research tools?
qa.a: Most tools stop at surfacing popular videos. Octupie runs the full workflow: outlier detection, pattern analysis, hook recreation, script-writing in your voice, then titles and captions ready to post. It is an agentic system, not a search engine with a script button.

qa.q: Does it actually write in my voice, not a generic AI voice?
qa.a: Yes. That is the whole point. Octupie learns your tone from your past posts, captions and comments, then rewrites outlier scripts using your vocabulary, pacing and phrasing. The pattern is viral, the voice stays yours.
Instagram Reels at launch. LinkedIn is on the roadmap as our next platform, with more to follow once we nail the core experience.
Yes. Paste any handle and Octupie monitors their output, surfaces their real outliers (not their baseline), and breaks down the hook, structure and angle behind each.

qa.q: Is this just another research tool?
qa.a: No. Octupie includes research, but it also produces ready-to-shoot scripts, titles and captions. Research is the starting point, not the finish line.
We are rolling out early access in waves. Join the waitlist with your name and email and you will be among the first to get an invite.

qa.q: What do I get on the waitlist?
qa.a: Launch updates, early-access invites and (for the first batch of creators) founder pricing once billing goes live.
No. You will only hear from us about Octupie product launches, updates and your invite. You can unsubscribe from any email.

qa.q: What do you do with my data?
qa.a: We store your name and email solely to notify you about Octupie. We never sell or share it with third parties.

left-column.tagline: mt-4 max-w-sm text-sm text-white/60. Copy: "Your personal viral-content researcher and script-writing agentic workflow. Research top creators, recreate outliers in your voice."

section.bottom-bar: mt-14 flex flex-col items-start justify-between gap-4 border-t border-white/10 pt-6 md:flex-row md:items-center. Left: copyright "© YEAR Octupie. All rights reserved." Right: "octupie.com".

pattern.name: fluid-display-heading
pattern.example: text-[clamp(32px,9vw,40px)] sm:text-[52px] md:text-[60px] lg:text-[68px] break-words hyphens-auto text-balance

pattern.name: safe-pill
pattern.rule: Flex container with multiple icon + text chunks must use flex-wrap + max-w-full + gap-x/gap-y to wrap rather than overflow.

pattern.name: section-grid
pattern.rule: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2|3 gap-5|8, always single column on mobile.

pattern.name: sticky-panel
pattern.rule: Inside a 2 col grid at lg+, the right column uses lg:sticky lg:top-24. The enclosing section MUST use overflow-x-clip, never overflow-hidden, to keep sticky working.

pattern.name: marquee
pattern.rule: Two rows, one forward, one reverse, each wrapping duplicated children in gpu-layer to keep on compositor. Fade masks at both ends via linear gradients.

pattern.name: hydration-safe-client
pattern.rule: Any Client Component using window must init state to a deterministic value and sync in useEffect post-mount. Body carries suppressHydrationWarning to absorb extension attrs.

browser.name: Chrome
browser.notes: Baseline. overflow-x: clip supported (90+). Mouse wheel smooth feels sticky if scroll-behavior: smooth; keep our focus-within gate.

browser.name: Safari macOS
browser.notes: Needs -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased for parity. backdrop-blur is OK on small elements, avoid on wide fixed elements.

browser.name: Safari iOS
browser.notes: Add -webkit-text-size-adjust: 100% to stop orientation font inflation. -webkit-overflow-scrolling: touch for legacy momentum.

browser.name: Firefox
browser.notes: overflow-x: clip supported 81+. backdrop-filter still partial in some builds, treat blur as progressive enhancement.

browser.name: Edge
browser.notes: Chromium, matches Chrome behavior. overscroll-behavior-y: none prevents rubber-band chaining with nested scrollers.

copy-invariants.rule: Never introduce em dashes (U+2014) or en dashes (U+2013) anywhere. Use commas, periods, colons, parentheses, or rewrite.
Never invent testimonials or attribute quotes to real-looking names and photos while the product is pre-launch.
When describing scope, always state: Instagram Reels at launch, LinkedIn next.
Tab title uses the pipe separator: "Octupie | ..." Never a dash.
CTA label is "Join the Waitlist" (title case, capital W).

reproduction.step: Adopt the 10-token color palette above. Everything else derives from it.
Load Host Grotesk (heading) and Inter (body). Set body bg #020814, text #FFFFFF, antialiased.
Apply global CSS rules: overflow-x: clip on html/body, scroll-behavior controlled by focus-within, overscroll-behavior-y: none, text-size-adjust 100%.
Port the OctupieLogo SVG (32x32 rounded square, 8 dots, gradient core) and register it as favicon (icon.svg in Next app dir, or /favicon.svg in any static site).
Replicate the 9 sections in order (Nav, Hero, Features, HowItWorks, SocialProof, WhyOctupie, Cta, Faq, Footer). Use the exact max-widths, paddings, and grid breakpoints listed.
Use inline SVG line icons for niches (1.6 stroke, currentColor). Use real Instagram + LinkedIn brand SVGs where platform references appear.
For any scrolling card list, use the marquee pattern with gpu-layer. For any fixed bar, do NOT use backdrop-blur-md.
For hydration safety, avoid reading window in useState init. If the framework renders both server and client, gate with suppressHydrationWarning on body.
Respect copy invariants. Do not fabricate quotes. Use niche archetype cards while pre-launch.
